description_long: This object is a stylized wooden sword with a broad, flat blade and a pointed tip. The blade features a visible wood grain texture and a lighter, worn patch near the center, suggesting frequent use or intentional design. The crossguard is rectangular and also displays wood grain patterns, providing a clear separation between the blade and the handle. The handle is short, cylindrical, and appears to be made from the same wood as the rest of the sword, with a slightly darker tone at the end. The overall construction is simple, with no visible metal components or sharp edges, indicating it is likely a toy or practice sword. The design is reminiscent of wooden training swords used in martial arts or as children's playthings.
description: A stylized wooden sword with a broad, flat blade, rectangular crossguard, and cylindrical handle, featuring visible wood grain and a worn patch on the blade.
description_view_0: The sword is seen edge-on, showing the narrow profile of the blade and handle, with the pointed tip and rectangular crossguard visible.
description_view_1: The broad face of the blade is visible, displaying the wood grain and a prominent lighter worn patch, with the crossguard and handle clearly shown.
description_view_2: Another edge-on view, similar to view 0, but from the opposite side, showing the thinness of the blade and handle.
description_view_3: The opposite broad face of the blade is visible, also showing wood grain and a lighter patch, with the crossguard and handle in view.
attribute_blade_type: straight, broad, flat, pointed tip, double-edged (non-sharp)
attribute_handle_design: short, cylindrical, wood, slightly darker end, smooth surface
attribute_ornamentation: wood grain pattern, lighter worn patch on blade
